name: PSS-170 Collection
description: All 100 voices from the Yamaha PSS-170 keyboard, converted from YM2413 OPLL register dumps. Register data captured by plgDavid via logic analyzer on the PSS-270 data bus (github.com/plgDavid/misc/tree/master/OPLL%20Synth%20Patches).
author: Yamaha / plgDavid (converted by Lucian Labs)
